sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50254" key="i(ke/teusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱκέτ-ευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱκεσία</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
